name: Signal Lost
description: Usmeri signal kroz oštećenu mrežu čvorova — puzzle-roguelike sa proceduralnom generacijom i checkpoint sistemom.

modules.src/main.js: Bootstrap, canvas resize, game loop (requestAnimationFrame), wires sve module, save timer
modules.src/config.js: Sve konstante — grid dimenzije po nivoima, signal brzine, boje (blueprint paleta), power-up trajanja, score formula
modules.src/state.js: Game state shape (level, signal, grid, power-ups, checkpoint), save/load/reset u localStorage
modules.src/input.js: Mouse/touch click handlers; mapira klik koordinate na grid čvor, buffered pressed/released snapshot
modules.src/render.js: Canvas rendering — pozadina, grid linije, čvorovi sa ikonama, signal animacija (glow dot), flash efekti
modules.src/audio.js: Web Audio API — bip, swoosh, clunk, level-clear melodija, fail ton, ambijentni hum; sve synthesizirano
modules.src/ui.js: HUD (nivo, skor, power-up slotovi), menije (start, power-up izbor, death, win, checkpoint) kao DOM overlay-i
modules.src/grid.js: Proceduralna generacija grida — garantovano solvabilni layout, random walk backbone, distribucija čvor tipova, validacija
modules.src/signal.js: Signal movement logic — path traversal čvor po čvor, Scrambler trigger, OR-Splitter grananje, fail/win detection
modules.src/powerups.js: Power-up sistem — pool generacija, aktivacija (Slow/Reveal/Freeze/TimeBubble/Echo), stanje trajanja, checkpoint pravila
modules.styles/base.css: Layout, full-screen canvas, reset, monospace font, touch-action none
modules.styles/ui.css: HUD stilizacija, menu overlay-i, power-up slotovi, dugmad (blueprint tema — cyan akcenti)
modules.styles/game.css: Canvas animacije — glow efekti, ripple, green/red flash keyframes, checkpoint puls, signal fade
